targets.query:
timeRangeStop = if v.timeRangeStop > now() then now() else v.timeRangeStop

from(bucket: "spotprice_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => (r["_measurement"] == "spot"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => (r["_field"] == "price_withtax"))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))
  |> mean()

panels.title: Avg. Spot Price (with tax, to now)

targets.query:
import "date"
import "math"


timeRangeStop = if v.timeRangeStop > now() then now() else v.timeRangeStop

avg_price = from(bucket: "spotprice_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => (r["_measurement"] == "spot" and r["_field"] == "price_withtax"))
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => key._measurement == "spot", column: "_value")

total_consumption = from(bucket: "emeters_staging")
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1h), stop: timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "emeter_diff")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: math.mMax(x: 0.0, y: r._value) * 0.001}))
  |> sum()
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => key._measurement == "energy", column: "_value")

emeter_consumption = from(bucket: "emeters_staging")
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1h), stop: timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "emeter_diff")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: math.mMax(x: 0.0, y: r._value) * 0.001}))

spot_price = from(bucket: "spotprice_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => (r["_measurement"] == "spot" and r["_field"] == "price_withtax"))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))

join(tables:{emeter_consumption:emeter_consumption, spot_price:spot_price}, on:["_time"])
  |> map(fn:(r) => ({
      time: r._time,
      _value: ((r._value_spot_price - avg_price[0])  * r._value_emeter_consumption) / total_consumption[0],
    }))
  |> sum()

import "date"
import "math"

timeRangeStop = if v.timeRangeStop > now() then now() else v.timeRangeStop

total_consumption = from(bucket: "emeters_staging")
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1h), stop: timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "emeter_diff")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: math.mMax(x:0.0, y:r._value) * 0.001}))
  |> sum()
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => key._measurement == "energy", column: "_value")

emeter_consumption = from(bucket: "emeters_staging")
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1h), stop: timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "emeter_diff")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: math.mMax(x:0.0, y:r._value) * 0.001}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

spot_price = from(bucket: "spotprice_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => (r["_measurement"] == "spot" and r["_field"] == "price_withtax"))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))

join(tables:{emeter_consumption:emeter_consumption, spot_price:spot_price}, on:["_time"])
  |> map(fn:(r) => ({
      time: r._time,
      _value: (r._value_spot_price  * r._value_emeter_consumption) / total_consumption[0],
    }))
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "analytics_15min_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "solar_yield_sum")
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 0.001}))

from(bucket: "analytics_15min_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "consumption_sum")
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 0.001}))

import "math"

from(bucket: "analytics_15min_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "emeter_sum")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: math.mMax(x: 0.0, y: r._value)}))
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 0.001}))

from(bucket: "analytics_15min_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "export_sum")
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 0.001}))

from(bucket: "analytics_15min_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "net_cost")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "analytics_15min_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_solar_savings")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "analytics_15min_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_arbitrage")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "analytics_15min_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_electricity_cost")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "spotprice_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "spot")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "price" or r["_field"] == "price_total" or r["_field"] == "price_withtax" or r["_field"] == "price_sell")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))
  |> yield(name: "prices")

from(bucket: "weather_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_field"] == "wind_speed" or r["_field"] == "Wind speed" or
    r["_field"] == "cloud_cover" or r["_field"] == "Cloud cover" or r["_field"] == "Total cloud cover" or
    r["_field"] == "solar_radiation" or r["_field"] == "Global radiation" or
    r["_field"] == "humidity" or r["_field"] == "Humidity" or
    r["_field"] == "precipitation" or r["_field"] == "Precipitation amount" or
    r["_field"] == "wind_direction" or r["_field"] == "Wind direction"
  )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value:
    if r._field == "wind_direction" or r._field == "Wind direction" then r._value * 0.1
    else if r._field == "solar_radiation" or r._field == "Global radiation" then r._value * 0.1
    else r._value
  }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "emeters_5min_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "solar_yield_avg" or r["_field"] == "consumption_avg" or r["_field"] == "emeter_avg" or r["_field"] == "battery_charge_avg" or r["_field"] == "battery_discharge_avg" or r["_field"] == "energy_import_avg" or r["_field"] == "energy_export_avg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "temperatures")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "temperatures")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] =~ /Ulkol.mp.$/ or r["_field"] == "Autotalli")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "sensors")

from(bucket: "weather_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "air_temperature" or r["_field"] == "Air temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "forecast")

from(bucket: "checkwatt_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "checkwatt")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "SolarYield" or r["_field"] == "BatteryCharge" or r["_field"] == "BatteryDischarge" or r["_field"] == "EnergyImport" or r["_field"] == "EnergyExport" or r["_field"] == "Battery_SoC")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "temperatures")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "temperatures")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_field"] == "Hilla" or r["_field"] == "Niila" or r["_field"] == "Savupiippu" or
    r["_field"] == "Valto" or r["_field"] == "PaaMH" or r["_field"] == "Pukuhuone" or
    r["_field"] == "Kirjasto" or r["_field"] == "Eteinen" or r["_field"] == "Keittio" or
    r["_field"] == "Tyohuone" or r["_field"] == "Leffahuone" or r["_field"] == "PaaMH2" or
    r["_field"] == "PaaMH3" or r["_field"] == "YlakertaKH" or r["_field"] == "KeskikerrosKH" or
    r["_field"] == "AlakertaKH"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "analytics_1hour_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "net_cost" or r["_field"] == "total_electricity_cost" or r["_field"] == "total_solar_savings" or r["_field"] == "battery_arbitrage")
  |> yield(name: "costs")

from(bucket: "temperatures")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "temperatures")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] =~ /K.ytt.vesi ylh/ or r["_field"] =~ /K.ytt.vesi alh/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "analytics_15min_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "solar_to_consumption" or r["_field"] == "solar_to_battery" or r["_field"] == "solar_to_export" or r["_field"] == "battery_to_consumption" or r["_field"] == "grid_to_battery")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "sum")

from(bucket: "temperatures")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "humidities")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "windpower_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "windpower")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] != "Max capacity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "load_control_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "load_control")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "is_on")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["load_id"] == "geothermal_pump" and r["data_type"] == "plan")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> yield(name: "schedule")

from(bucket: "spotprice_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "spot")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "price_withtax")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 100.0}))
  |> yield(name: "prices")

from(bucket: "shelly_em3_emeters_raw_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "shelly_em3")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "phase1_power" or r["_field"] == "phase2_power" or r["_field"] == "phase3_power" or r["_field"] == "total_power")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "analytics_1hour_staging")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "analytics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "net_cost" or r["_field"] == "total_electricity_cost" or r["_field"] == "total_solar_savings")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false, offset: -3h)
  |> yield(name: "daily")
